recommendations.title: Viking Wolf
recommendations.overview: After witnessing a grotesque murder at a party in her new town, a teenager starts having strange visions and bizarre desires.

recommendations.title: The Skeptic
recommendations.overview: After the mysterious death of his Aunt, a confirmed skeptic lawyer, Bryan Becket, dismisses reports that her house is haunted and moves in. Immediately occurrences begin he cannot explain. And beyond the occurrences there is something about the house

recommendations.title: The Wailing
recommendations.overview: A stranger arrives in a little village and soon after a mysterious sickness starts spreading. A policeman is drawn into the incident and is forced to solve the mystery in order to save his daughter.

recommendations.title: Killing Ground
recommendations.overview: A couple's camping trip turns into a frightening ordeal when they stumble across the scene of a horrific crime.

recommendations.title: I'm Thinking of Ending Things
recommendations.overview: Nothing is as it seems when a woman experiencing misgivings about her new boyfriend joins him on a road trip to meet his parents at their remote farm.

recommendations.title: Dreamcatcher
recommendations.overview: The film centers on two estranged sisters who, along with their friends, become entrenched in a 48 hour whirlwind of violence after a traumatic experience at an underground music festival.

recommendations.title: The House That Dripped Blood
recommendations.overview: A Scotland Yard investigator looks into four mysterious cases involving an unoccupied house.

recommendations.title: The Professor and the Madman
recommendations.overview: Professor James Murray begins work compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, and receives over 10,000 entries from a patient at Broadmoor Criminal Lunatic Asylum, Dr. William Minor.

recommendations.title: Patient Seven
recommendations.overview: Dr. Marcus, a renowned psychiatrist, has selected 6 severe mentally ill and dangerous patients from the Spring Valley Mental Hospital to interview as part of research for his new book. As Dr. Marcus interviews each patient, one by one the horrors the
recommendations.director: Rasmus Wassberg, Erlingur Thoroddsen, Johannes Persson, Dean Hewison, Paul Davis, Danny Draven, Joel Morgan, Nicholas Peterson, Ómar Örn Hauksson

recommendations.title: 6 Souls
recommendations.overview: A female forensic psychiatrist discovers that all of one of her patient's multiple personalities are murder victims. She will have to find out what's happening before her time is finished.
